Good to Know
Spots, bars, & details
⛳ Golf
Thu The Muni (Charleston Municipal Golf Course)
Sat The Ocean Course · Kiawah Island
Price $650 per person
Post-round Ryder Cup Bar — 18th hole views
🍽️ Restaurants
  • Salt Water Cowboys — Shem Creek (Fri lunch)
  • Burwells — Downtown Charleston (Fri dinner) · Menu →
  • ACME — Isle of Palms (Sun lunch)
  • SeaBiscuit — Isle of Palms (Sun lunch)
  • Cafe Paname — IOP (coffee)
🍺 Bars & Nightlife
  • Windjammer — Isle of Palms (Thu night)
  • Prohibition — Upper King St (Fri night)
  • Cocktail Club — Upper King St (Fri night)
  • Uptown Social — Upper King St (Fri night)
  • Shem Creek bar hop (Fri afternoon)
  • IOP Beach dive bars (Sat night)
🛶 Activities
  • Kayak — Shem Creek (Fri 11:00 AM)
  • Beach — Isle of Palms (Sun)

✈️  View on JetBlue
⏰  BOS heads up: JetBlue is Terminal C at Logan. Aim to be at the gate by 5:30 AM — security can be slow early mornings.
🧳  Return: Check out of the Airbnb by noon on May 10. Flight boards around 4:00 PM at CHS.
